description_html:
Brand Story: ZenLife

Born in the serene coastal town of Byron Bay, Australia, ZenLife was founded by Sarah and Mike after they discovered the transformative power of yoga following corporate burnout. Every non slip yoga mat sold funds one yoga class for underprivileged communities through our 'One Mat, One Class' program, making your practice a force for good.

Product Specifications

  • Material: Double-layer TPE (Thermoplastic Elastomer) – eco-friendly, 100% recyclable, free of PVC, latex, and toxins
  • Thickness: 6mm optimal thickness for joint cushioning and ground stability
  • Dimensions: 72" x 26" extra-wide surface for all body types
  • Features: Laser-etched alignment lines, non-slip texture on both sides
  • Accessories: Includes carrying strap and storage bag

Core Selling Points

  • Double-Layer TPE Material with Laser-Etched Alignment Lines: This yoga mat with alignment lines provides superior cushioning for your joints while maintaining ground feel, helping you perfect poses for better balance and form.
  • Non-Slip Texture on Both Sides: Ensures a secure grip even during hot yoga or intense sweat sessions, preventing slips and injuries so you can focus on your practice – the ultimate non slip yoga mat for every session.
  • Eco-Friendly and 100% Recyclable: Made without PVC, latex, or toxins, this TPE yoga mat is safe for you and the planet, supporting a sustainable lifestyle.
  • 6mm Optimal Thickness: Offers the perfect balance of cushioning for joints and stability for balance poses, ideal for both beginners and advanced practitioners.
  • Extra-Wide 72" x 26" Surface with Carrying Strap and Storage Bag: Provides ample space for all body types and easy portability, making it convenient for home, studio, or travel use.

Usage Scenarios

Whether you're practicing at home, in a studio, or outdoors, this eco friendly yoga mat adapts to your lifestyle. Its non-slip surface excels in hot yoga, while the alignment lines guide you through vinyasa flows, restorative poses, and balance work. The included carrying strap and storage bag make it perfect for travel, so you never miss a practice.

Quality Assurance

ZenLife stands behind the durability and performance of every mat. Our TPE yoga mat is rigorously tested for non-slip grip, material safety, and long-term use. We offer a 30-day satisfaction guarantee and a 1-year warranty against manufacturing defects. Plus, with our 'One Mat, One Class' program, your purchase directly supports yoga access for underserved communities.

a_plus_modules.title: Elevate Your Practice with ZenLife
a_plus_modules.description: Top banner showcasing the premium yoga mat with brand story and key value proposition
a_plus_modules.image_suggestion: Hero shot: Mat rolled out on hardwood floor, morning sunlight, with ZenLife logo and tagline 'One Mat, One Class'
a_plus_modules.copy_text: From Byron Bay to Your Mat – Every Practice Gives Back. Discover the 6mm TPE mat that combines eco-conscious design with laser-precision alignment. Non-slip, non-toxic, and 100% recyclable. Join 50,000+ yogis who practice with purpose.

a_plus_modules.title: Laser-Etched Alignment – Perfect Your Pose
a_plus_modules.description: Left image with right text highlighting the alignment lines feature
a_plus_modules.image_suggestion: Detail shot: Close-up of alignment lines and texture pattern, showing laser-etched precision
a_plus_modules.copy_text: Never second-guess your alignment again. Our laser-etched grid system guides hands and feet into optimal position for every asana. The subtle texture provides tactile feedback without distraction – so you can focus on your flow, not your footing.

a_plus_modules.title: 6mm Sweet Spot – Cushion Meets Stability
a_plus_modules.description: Right image with left text explaining the thickness benefit
a_plus_modules.image_suggestion: Lifestyle shot: Woman in warrior II pose on mat, ocean view background, showing mat thickness and stability
a_plus_modules.copy_text: Too thin hurts your joints. Too thick wobbles your balance. Our 6mm TPE core delivers the perfect balance: plush cushioning for knees and wrists, yet firm enough to feel the ground beneath you. Ideal for both restorative and dynamic practices.

a_plus_modules.title: ZenLife vs. Standard PVC Mats – The Sweat Test
a_plus_modules.description: Comparison table showing key differences between ZenLife mat and typical PVC mats
a_plus_modules.image_suggestion: Comparison: ZenLife mat vs standard PVC mat sweat test, showing non-slip performance
a_plus_modules.copy_text:
| Feature | ZenLife TPE Mat | Standard PVC Mat |
|---------|----------------|------------------|
| Material | Double-layer TPE (100% recyclable) | PVC (non-recyclable) |
| Non-Slip (Hot Yoga) | ✓ Dual-side texture | ✗ Slippery when wet |
| Toxins | Zero PVC, latex, or phthalates | Often contains phthalates |
| Thickness | 6mm (optimal) | 4-5mm (thin) or 8mm+ (unstable) |
| Alignment Lines | Laser-etched, permanent | None or printed (fades) |
| Eco Impact | 100% recyclable, funds yoga classes | Landfill waste |
| Accessories | Carrying strap + storage bag included | Sold separately |

a_plus_modules.title: Eco-Friendly from Start to Finish
a_plus_modules.description: Left image with right text explaining TPE lifecycle and sustainability
a_plus_modules.image_suggestion: Eco credentials: Infographic showing TPE material lifecycle from raw materials to recycling
a_plus_modules.copy_text: Your practice shouldn't cost the earth. Our TPE material is free from PVC, latex, and toxic glues – and it's 100% recyclable at end of life. Plus, every mat sold funds one yoga class for underprivileged communities through our 'One Mat, One Class' program. Breathe deeper knowing your mat gives back.

a_plus_modules.title: ZenLife Premium Yoga Mat – Specifications
a_plus_modules.description: Detailed specifications table for technical buyers
a_plus_modules.image_suggestion: Product shot showing mat dimensions and accessories (carrying strap and bag)
a_plus_modules.copy_text:
| Specification | Detail |
|---------------|--------|
| Dimensions | 72" x 26" (183 x 66 cm) – extra-wide |
| Thickness | 6mm |
| Material | Double-layer TPE (Thermoplastic Elastomer) |
| Weight | 2.5 lbs (1.13 kg) |
| Non-Slip | Dual-side texture, wet & dry grip |
| Alignment | Laser-etched grid lines |
| Eco Certifications | 100% recyclable, PVC-free, latex-free, phthalate-free |
| Included Accessories | Carrying strap + storage bag |
| Care | Wipe clean with damp cloth, air dry |
| Warranty | 1-year manufacturer warranty |

a_plus_modules.title: Join the ZenLife Movement – Practice with Purpose
a_plus_modules.description: Final call-to-action module with brand story and social proof
a_plus_modules.image_suggestion: Lifestyle shot: Woman in warrior II pose on mat, ocean view background, with ZenLife logo and 'One Mat, One Class' tagline
a_plus_modules.copy_text: Sarah and Mike left corporate burnout to build a brand that gives back. Every ZenLife mat funds a yoga class for underprivileged communities. Join 50,000+ yogis who practice with purpose. Roll out your mat, find your alignment, and make every pose a step toward a better world. Namaste.

findings: 标题中出现了'Non-Slip Yoga Mat'和'Yoga Mat'，覆盖了核心关键词'non slip yoga mat'和'yoga mat'。
五点描述中多次出现'yoga mat'、'TPE'、'eco-friendly'等关键词，但未过度堆砌。
长描述中使用了'non slip yoga mat'一次，整体密度合理。
缺少对'TPE yoga mat'和'eco friendly yoga mat'的直接强调，但通过上下文已隐含。
suggestions: 在五点描述或长描述中明确加入'TPE yoga mat'和'eco friendly yoga mat'短语，例如在材料部分直接写'This TPE yoga mat is eco-friendly'。
在长描述中自然融入'yoga mat with alignment lines'，例如'Our yoga mat with alignment lines helps perfect your poses'。

findings: 标题长度约120字符，符合≤200字符要求，信息清晰。
五点描述每点约30-50词，语言流畅，使用了短句和项目符号，扫描友好。
长描述使用HTML标签分段，但部分内容（如品牌故事）稍长，可能分散注意力。
整体信息层次分明，从标题到五点再到描述逻辑连贯。
suggestions: 将长描述中的品牌故事精简为2-3句话，突出产品核心卖点。
在长描述中增加更多空白行或小标题，提升扫描友好度。

findings: 标题、五点描述、长描述均已覆盖，缺少A+内容（但非必需）。
五点描述涵盖了材料、防滑、环保、厚度、尺寸等关键信息。
长描述包含了品牌故事、产品规格、使用场景和保养说明，信息全面。
缺少客户评价或使用场景的视觉描述（如图片替代文本）。
suggestions: 考虑添加A+模块（如对比图或使用场景图），以增强视觉吸引力。
在长描述中增加'Customer Reviews'或'Testimonials'部分（如果平台允许）。

findings: 标题突出了'Non-Slip'、'Eco-Friendly'、'Alignment Lines'等卖点，能吸引目标买家。
五点描述强调了防滑、环保、厚度和便携性，直接解决买家痛点。
品牌故事增加了情感价值，但可能对实用型买家来说稍显冗长。
缺少价格或促销信息，但作为Listing质量审核，此点非必需。
suggestions: 在长描述中增加一个'Why Choose ZenLife?'部分，总结核心优势。
确保五点描述中的每个卖点都对应一个买家痛点（如'Non-Slip'对应'安全'）。

improvement_priority: 在五点描述或长描述中明确加入'TPE yoga mat'和'eco friendly yoga mat'短语，提升关键词覆盖率。
精简长描述中的品牌故事，突出产品核心卖点，提升可读性和转化率。
考虑添加A+内容或客户评价，增强完整性和信任度。
